title: Global theme "dark" not found for org "asi"
rationale: User references a global theme that does not exist. stitchGlobalTheme already passes ConfigError to failAndThrow for 404 and NOT_FOUND responses.
fixSummary: Already fixed: failAndThrow passes { code: ConfigError } for theme-not-found.
problemSignature: Global theme 404/NOT_FOUND classified as ConfigError by stitchGlobalTheme.
